'''TDL-3.5''' was a [[TDL nanny droid]] that was purchased by [[Anakin Solo]]. It tried to replace [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] as caretaker of the Solo children under a code invented by Anakin, "[[Bantha four five six]]." [[Winter Celchu]], who was taking care of the children with C-3PO, recognized that "Bantha four five six" was not the Solo family [[recognition code]] for their droids.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}}
